title: Dichilus pusillus
taxonomy: Dichilus pusillus is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This classification places it within the legume family, which includes a wide variety of plants that produce pods containing seeds. Within the Fabaceae family, Dichilus pusillus is part of the subfamily Faboideae. The subfamily Faboideae is further divided into numerous genera and species, each with unique characteristics. Further research may be necessary to determine the exact classification and relationships within the genus Dichilus.
